channel.title: AI & Tech News Aggregator
channel.description: Aggregated AI and Tech news from 11 sources

item.title: Anthropic vs. the Pentagon: This Time, a US Court Has Ruled in the Government's Favor
item.description: [WIRED AI] A US appeals court ruling is at odds with a separate, lower court decision from March, leaving uncertainty about if and how the US military can use the AI company's Claude model.

item.title: Meta’s New AI Model Gives Mark Zuckerberg a Seat at the Big Kid’s Table
item.description: [WIRED AI] Muse Spark is Meta’s first model since its AI reboot, and the benchmarks suggest formidable performance.

item.title: The US Army Is Building Its Own Chatbot for Combat
item.description: [WIRED AI] The AI system, trained on real military data, is meant to give soldiers mission-critical information.

item.title: Greece to ban social media for under-15s from next year
item.description: [BBC Technology] It follows similar moves in other European countries, including France and Spain.

item.title: AI content can rank, but quality still decides winners
item.description: [MarTech] Semrush’s study shows AI content is already competing in search, but performance still comes down to execution, not the tool. The post AI content can rank, but quality still decides winners appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Ex-Meta worker investigated for downloading 30,000 private Facebook photos
item.description: [BBC Technology] The former employee was fired from Meta after being suspected of downloading 30,000 photos, the company said.

item.title: Anthropic tops US$30 billion run rate, seals deal with Broadcom
item.description: [Business Times] More than 1,000 business customers spend over US$1 million annually on Claude services

item.title: Using AI isn’t the same as getting value from it
item.description: [MarTech] Most teams have access to AI, but still struggle to see meaningful results. The issue isn’t the tools, but where they’re applied. The post Using AI isn’t the same as getting value from it appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: OpenAI encourages firms to trial four-day weeks to adapt to AI era
item.description: [BBC Technology] The ChatGPT-maker said its early policy ideas aim to prompt discussions about action needed as AI systems become more capable.

item.title: China is winning one AI race, the US another - but either might pull ahead
item.description: [BBC Technology] Both sides don't want to let their rival dominate. And the competition may yet be transformed further.

item.title: Oil prices extend gains after attacks lower Saudi production capacity
item.description: [Straits Times] Saudi Arabia said its oil production capacity has been cut by around 600,000 barrels a day due to attacks on energy infrastructure.

item.title: 【钛晨报】中国自贸试验区扩围至23个，新增内蒙古；腾讯云：5月9日起对AI算力、容器服务及弹性MapReduce（EMR）相关产品刊例价进行调整；消息称特斯拉Cybercab量产启动
item.description: [钛媒体] 淘宝闪购上线首个支持语音搜索能力的商家端AI Agent；字节跳动推出原生全双工语音大模型Seeduplex；蜜雪冰城“早餐系列”已下架；亚马逊芯片业务年化营收现已超过200亿美元；OpenAI因能源成本问题暂停英国“星际之门”项目；财政部、交通运输部：自2026年起用3年左右时间集中力量支持30个左右城市（群）实施新一轮国家综合货运枢纽补链强链提升行动；工信部等5部门：支持各地制定出台精准有效的中小企业人才支持政策；三部门指导平台企业落实《互联网平台价格行为规则》；阶跃星辰近期完成股改，计划年内港股上市；已有70单机构间REITs项目在上交所申报，规模超1300亿元；乘联分会：3月乘用车生产

item.title: Meta pulls ads aimed at recruiting plaintiffs for social media addiction lawsuits
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Exclusive-Anthropic weighs building it own AI chips, sources say
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: ChatGPT has a new $100 per month Pro subscription
item.description: [The Verge AI] OpenAI has announced a new version of its ChatGPT Pro subscription that costs $100 per month. The new Pro tier offers "5x more" usage of its Codex coding tool than the $20 per month Plus subscription and "is best for longer, high-effort Codex sessions," OpenAI says. The company is introducing the ne

item.title: Elon Musk's xAI sues Colorado over state's new AI law
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Meta transfers top engineers into new AI tooling team
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Florida launches investigation into OpenAI
item.description: [The Verge AI] Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier is launching an investigation into OpenAI over public safety and national security risks, as reported earlier by Reuters. In a statement on Thursday, Uthmeier says there are concerns that OpenAI's data and technology are "falling into the hands of America's en

item.title: ChatGPT finally offers $100/month Pro plan
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] OpenAI announced on Thursday something that power users have been asking for: a $100/month plan. Previously, subscriptions jumped from $20 to $200 per month.

item.title: AI may be useful, but you still need to save for retirement
item.description: [Straits Times] The purpose of saving and investing is to hedge against an uncertain future

item.title: OpenAI pauses UK data centre deal over energy costs and regulation
item.description: [BBC Technology] The project was part of a package of tech investment promising the UK could become an AI superpower.

item.title: Florida AG announces investigation into OpenAI over shooting that allegedly involved ChatGPT
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] ChatGPT had reportedly been used to plan the attack that killed two and injured five at Florida State University last April. The family of one victim has said that they plan to sue OpenAI over the incident.

item.title: After data breach, $10B-valued startup Mercor is having a month
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] After falling victim to a hacker, Mercor is facing lawsuits and reportedly losing big-name customers.

item.title: Meta AI app climbs to No. 5 on the App Store after Muse Spark launch
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] The app was ranking No. 57 on the App Store just before Meta AI's new model launched. Now it's No. 5 — and rising.

item.title: CFO Anthony Armstrong leaves xAI, the Information reports
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Is Anthropic limiting the release of Mythos to protect the internet — or Anthropic?
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Anthropic said this week that it limited the release of its newest model, dubbed Mythos, because it is too capable of finding security exploits in software relied upon by users around the world. Are real cybersecurity concerns a cover for a bigger problem at the frontier lab?

item.title: Google and Intel deepen AI infrastructure partnership
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] The two tech giants are looking to co-develop custom chips, at a time when demand for CPUs is high due to a growing global shortage.

item.title: The 70-Person AI Image Startup Taking on Silicon Valley's Giants
item.description: [WIRED AI] Black Forest Labs has long punched above its weight in the AI image generation space. Its next move? Powering physical AI.

item.title: Google’s Gemini AI can answer your questions with 3D models and simulations
item.description: [The Verge AI] Google's latest upgrade for Gemini will allow the chatbot to generate interactive 3D models and simulations in response to your questions. With the new feature, you may see options to rotate the AI-generated model, manually adjust sliders on it, or input different values to change the simulation in

item.title: The latest AI-powered martech news and releases
item.description: [MarTech] AI marketing is becoming more transactional and citation-driven, with ads, commerce and trust signals converging inside chatbot conversations. The post The latest AI-powered martech news and releases appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: US software stocks slump on renewed AI disruption jitters
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: 独家 | Happy Horse-1.0确系阿里研发，将于近期正式发布
item.description: [钛媒体] 阿里云将很快将该模型上线百炼平台，阿里巴巴近期的组织调整也与此有关。

item.title: 股票精选回顾：哪些奏效了，接下来会怎样
item.description: [钛媒体] 本周回顾以往股票推荐的内容聚焦于美国航空（American Airlines）、环球技术学院（Universal Technical Institute）和金德尔摩根（Kinder Morgan）。

item.title: The AI industry’s race for profits is now existential
item.description: [The Verge AI] Today on Decoder, let’s talk about the looming AI monetization cliff, and whether some of the biggest companies in the space can become real, profitable businesses before they careen right off it. My guest today is Hayden Field, who’s our senior AI reporter here at The Verge. She’s been keeping clos

item.title: The Pro-Iran Meme Machine Trolling Trump With AI Lego Cartoons
item.description: [WIRED AI] Since the beginning of the Iran war, the group Explosive Media has released over a dozen viral videos mocking Trump and the US.

item.title: How to make AI work with context instead of prompts
item.description: [MarTech] AI struggles in enterprises not because of prompts, but because it lacks context. Here's how to build systems that fix that. The post How to make AI work with context instead of prompts appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: AI植发机器人企业磅策医疗完成亿元B轮融资｜融资速递
item.description: [钛媒体] 脱发人群开始呈现显著年轻化趋势，90后、00后成为消费主力军，20-40岁人群占植发客群比例高达95%

item.title: Critical thinking, lifelong learning among skills needed to navigate AI-driven workplace: UOB CEO
item.description: [Straits Times] Tech should "enable people to do higher-value work, not simply more work", said Mr Wee Ee Cheong.

item.title: Anthropic挖角微软Azure AI掌舵人，负责AI 基础设施建设
item.description: [钛媒体] AI竞争进入基建决定论阶段

item.title: 走出ICU的“AI三小龙”，究竟做对了什么？
item.description: [钛媒体] 大模型2.0时代，属于“制药厂 ”

item.title: Google makes it easy to deepfake yourself
item.description: [The Verge AI] YouTube Shorts is rolling out a new AI-powered feature giving creators an easy way to realistically clone themselves on camera. The launch, hinted at earlier this year, reflects the platform's fraught relationship with AI-generated content, adding more generative features while struggling to contain

item.title: This AI Wearable From Ex-Apple Engineers Looks Like an iPod Shuffle
item.description: [WIRED AI] Two former Apple Vision Pro developers made an AI wearable that only listens when you tap it. They hope to win where other AI gadgets have fumbled: privacy.

item.title: 对话美团GN06刘炯：美团为什么做了一款AI浏览器？
item.description: [36氪] 作者｜任彩茹 编辑｜乔芊 并入美团两年半，GN06（光年之外应团队并入美团后的名字）被赋予的使命始终是：在主营业务之外，找AI Native的增长点。今年3月，他们把这件事落到了一个具体的产品上——AI浏览器「Tabbit」正式进入公测。 为什么是浏览器？大公司在AI领域争展锋芒，行业如今的热词是“虾”、“Agent”、“Token”，浏览器一定不是那个看起来“最性感”的形态，也很难与美团的核心业务紧密相融。 GN06负责人刘炯认为，AI应用的做法可以有100种，而他想做的事情，是让浏览器帮技术“小白”把活干了，解放大家的时间。 “大量的学生、知识工作者、自媒体，每天大部分

item.title: 一个225平方公里的“庄”，如何成为AI“顶流”
item.description:
[36氪] 亦庄又“炸场”了。
AI未来大会现场 4月8日启幕的AI FUTURE北京亦庄AI未来大会上，一系列重磅消息密集释放，彻底点燃科技圈热度。这场为期两天的盛会，吸引了2000余位业内精英、34家头部企业参与。
AI未来大会现场  现场更有罗振宇、方汉等行业大佬现场分享洞见，成为亦庄AI实力的一次集中秀肌肉。
AI未来大会现场 在AIFUT北京亦庄AI未来大会上，全国首个聚焦AI超级个体的全周期服务站——北京经开区模数OPC（One Person Company）社区正式亮相。目前，模数OPC社区首期3000平方米创新空间已投用，未来计划在两年内

item.title: OBSBOT寻影新品发布，在口袋直播摄像头中实现AI智能跟踪与4K画质｜最前线
item.description: [36氪] 作者｜黄楠 编辑｜袁斯来 直播与视频会议已成为日常工作和生活的一部分，创作者对设备的需求也从“能拍就行”转向了“随时随地专业开播”。 但当前市场上的常见方案各有短板：手机直播容易过热降频，且无法灵活多机位；传统网络摄像头画质一般、对焦慢、缺少智能跟踪；单反加采集卡虽然画质好，但整套设备笨重，还需要复杂的供电和推流设置，移动场景下很难即开即用。 这个介于“专业画质”与“极致便携”之间的市场空白，正被越来越多设备厂商视为新的机会点。 4月9日，全球智能影像品牌OBSBOT寻影最新产品寻影Tiny 3正式发布，一款仅重63g、搭载1/1.28英寸传感器并支持4K超清画质的AI直播

item.title: INAIR完成千万美元融资，便携空间主机适配多款 AR 眼镜｜最前线
item.description: [36氪] 近日，下一代移动计算平台公司 Inair 多屏未来（以下简称 Inair）宣布完成千万美元 A+ 轮融资。本轮融资由君联资本、高瓴创投、弘晖基金联合投资，资金将主要用于加速便携空间主机（PSS） 产品 Inair Pod 的生态拓展、空间操作系统研发及垂直行业应用落地。 Inair 多屏未来是一家专注于空间计算与移动生产力的科技公司，由两名在科技领域的连续创业者发起，初创团队拥有 AR 硬件、软件、产品和市场经验，团队成员来自于多家互联网及科技领域的知名企业。 该公司以 AR 眼镜作为入口，致力于为消费者提供下一代的 All-in-one 移动办公解决方案，核心产品为 Inair Po

item.title: Time to buy US AI, tech names if Middle East de-escalation holds, say analysts
item.description: [Business Times] Singapore will also be the first to see clear benefits as AI comes to fore in Asia

item.title: From shopping to gaming: ShopBack sees over 30% growth in FY 2026
item.description: [Business Times] This uptick in revenue marks a departure from the flat numbers the company has seen in the past two years

item.title: No quick relief for oil and LNG prices as S’pore, Asia face uncertain return to normal supply: Analysts
item.description: [Straits Times] Dated Brent, the benchmark for physical oil trade, is still trading at about US$144 a barrel, its highest level since 2008.

item.title: 耀速科技获2亿人民币融资，将“AI+器官芯片”嵌入新药开发流程
item.description:
[36氪] 文｜胡香赟 编辑｜海若镜 制药行业离“告别”动物实验又近了一步。 从2022年FDA的现代化法案2.0被批准开始，“替代动物实验”的监管战略一直在持续。今年3月中旬，FDA终于发文表态，开始接收非动物数据支撑新药评审，鼓励使用类器官/器官芯片、AI毒理学模型等新方法学（NAMs），逐步减少药企对动物实验的依赖。
图源：FDA官网 伴随政策层面的深入，类器官/器官芯片企业在一级市场上的声量也逐步提高。仅今年来，就有至少5家相关企业披露融资。比如，4月初，AI for 3D Bioliogy平台企业耀速科技刚刚宣布完成2亿人民币A轮融资，本轮募资由国寿股权独家领投，老股东

item.title: 对话前阿里高管、天猫设计家CEO：这些年烧掉千亿，家装行业还能怎么做？
item.description: [36氪] 文丨彭倩 编辑丨乔芊 “苦大仇深”是马学军对自己的形容。 他曾在传统行业和互联网创业十几年，任职阿里时期花名"郭大路"，操盘的都是实体行业互联网化的项目，从天猫超市、天猫医药、天猫家装、天猫预售、喵鲜生到喵街，无一例外。这些从0到1的创新型业务，都不是单靠淘宝流量能长出来的。 搞家装对他而言更是一场迟迟未决出胜负的赌局。2010年，马学军就在天猫掌管家装业务——从北京3万多方的“天猫爱蜂巢家装体验馆”、利用3D软件做了“设计师淘客”，到参与孵化“家装E站”所谓的“互联网家装”。回过头看，他认为这些项目只能算是提高了局部效率，并未提升整个产业效率，消费者并没有感知且对服务结果仍然

item.title: Fintech player Aspire taps JPMorgan to help companies with forex conversions
item.description: [Business Times] They will initially focus on multiple currencies, including the pound, Singapore and US dollar

item.title: Disney plans to cut 1,000 jobs, WSJ reports
item.description: [Straits Times] Many of the layoffs will be made in the company’s marketing department, the report said.

item.title: Thomson Plaza retail space sold for $250 million
item.description: [Straits Times] The seller, Hong Kong’s Link REIT, was reported in June 2025 to be considering a listing in Singapore.

item.title: Gemini gets notebooks to help you organize projects
item.description: [The Verge AI] Google's Gemini is getting a feature called "notebooks" to help you organize things about certain topics in a single place while using the AI chatbot, the company announced on Wednesday. You can pull in things like files, past conversations, and custom instructions into notebooks that Gemini can the

item.title: Broadcom signs long-term deal to develop Google’s custom AI chips
item.description: [Business Times] Demand for custom chips has surged in recent years

item.title: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google unite to combat model copying in China
item.description: [Business Times] Trump administration officials have signalled their openness to fostering information sharing among AI companies to rein in adversarial distillation

item.title: Businesses scramble to get noticed by AI search
item.description: [BBC Technology] Firms are changing the way they present information on their websites, so they get noticed by AI.

item.title: AI and empathy define the next era of marketing systems
item.description: [MarTech] The real opportunity with AI is not scale alone, but designing experiences that reduce friction and support both customers and teams. The post AI and empathy define the next era of marketing systems appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Three first-party data strategies retail brands are prioritizing now
item.description: [MarTech] As 3rd-party cookies fade, mid-market retailers are leaning on direct value exchanges, ID-driven experiences and zero-party signals to rebuild their data. The post Three first-party data strategies retail brands are prioritizing now appeared first on MarTech.
